{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Thornfur Brawler
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Thornfur Brawlers are humanoid rabbits that are muscular and battle-scarred.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator's Thornfur Brawlers are a pair of muscular rabbits.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c49">''The Engineer'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
